response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some C/C++), but the role specifically requires a C++ developer with 8-12 years of deep C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity experience. The only C/C++ exposure is a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. There is no evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443/SDL practice, MQTT, or relevant protocols like Modbus/OPC UA. Skills and trajectory point toward web/cloud rather than embedded industrial C++ systems.
strengths: 10+ years of overall senior-level engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Solid background in low-latency, high-throughput, asynchronous services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) with concurrency awareness
Strong software craftsmanship — TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and architectural thinking
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience; the only C/C++ role was ~6 months in 2014-2015
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or industrial protocol experience (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, MQTT)
Recent career trajectory is firmly web/cloud/TypeScript and AI tooling — not the embedded/on-prem C++ platform space the role targets

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general senior engineering and concurrency experience
